batches.reviewer: Set at merge (GitHub handle or name)
batches.sourceClass: Maintainer paraphrase from general game knowledge + Wowhead spell pages; no comment HTML stored. Epic C.4 script available for future LLM drafts (npm run farm-tip:draft).
batches.notes: Pilot batch for C.4 acceptance: diverse raid/world-adjacent drops. Final one-liners edited for site voice; run farm-tip-llm-draft.mjs with FARM_TIP_OPENAI_API_KEY for true LLM-assisted drafts on later batches.
